source: RuneQuest Starter Set Book 2: The World of Glorantha (2021)

religion_and_magic.summary: A central theme of Glorantha is the relationship between mortals and the gods. Polytheism is the most prevalent religious practice, cult membership gives access to Rune magic and spirit magic, and cults function as both religion and community.

benefits: Guidance through Passions such as Devotion and Loyalty
Access to Rune magic through shared Rune affinities

major_deities.name: Aldrya
major_deities.detail: Rules forests and is mother of elves and dryads.

major_deities.name: Argan Argar
major_deities.detail: Leader among trolls during the Darkness, messenger and translator, god of merchants.

major_deities.name: Babeester Gor
major_deities.detail: Earth's grim defender against kin-slayers, oath-breakers, and desecrators.

major_deities.name: Chalana Arroy
major_deities.detail: Heals all diseases and wounds and healed the world after the Great Darkness.

major_deities.name: Daka Fal
major_deities.detail: Separated the living from the dead and is invoked in worship of the dead.

major_deities.name: Ernalda
major_deities.detail: Earth Queen, life-giver, goddess of women, fertility, agriculture, and motherhood.

major_deities.name: Eurmal
major_deities.detail: Dangerous and treacherous Trickster God, one of the Seven Lightbringers.

major_deities.name: Humakt
major_deities.detail: God of endings, Death, war, and honorable severance.

major_deities.name: Issaries
major_deities.detail: Lord of Trade, Guardian of Roads, Messenger of the Gods, associated with Tradetalk.

major_deities.name: Kyger Litor
major_deities.detail: Ancestress of all troll races.

major_deities.name: Lhankor Mhy
major_deities.detail: God of scribes, sages, history, laws, and writing.

major_deities.name: Magasta
major_deities.detail: King of the Sea Gods, master of life and death within the depths.

major_deities.name: Maran Gor
major_deities.detail: Goddess of destruction and feared earth power.

major_deities.name: Mostal
major_deities.detail: Dwarf god who tends the World Engine and governs making and building.

major_deities.name: Orlanth
major_deities.detail: Master of Storms, King of the Gods, chief of the Seven Lightbringers.

major_deities.name: The Red Goddess
major_deities.detail: Goddess of the Red Moon and the Lunar Empire.

major_deities.name: The Seven Mothers
major_deities.detail: Primary pantheon of the Lunar Empire.

major_deities.name: Storm Bull
major_deities.detail: Manifestation of berserk, barbaric fury against Chaos.

major_deities.name: Yelm
major_deities.detail: God of the Sun, who dies each night and returns at dawn.

major_deities.name: Yelmalio
major_deities.detail: Son of Yelm and patron of the Sun Dome Temple.

rune_cults_table.summary: Book 2 provides a Rune cults table pairing major deities with their Rune associations and one-line descriptions.

rune_masters.summary: Elite cult members, including Rune Priests, Rune Lords, and God-talkers, possess greater magic and greater responsibilities.
